spurious_features.label: Negation Pattern (haven't)
spurious_features.reason: Detects negation pattern; directly used as contradiction shortcut.

spurious_features.label: Lexical 'well' Detection
spurious_features.reason: Pure lexical detector with no semantic role.

spurious_features.label: Affirmation Adverb Pattern (yeah)
spurious_features.reason: Pattern matcher on conversational token, not meaning.

spurious_features.label: Polysemous 'double' (LaTeX)
spurious_features.reason: Misfires on token-specific polysemy, not task semantics.

causal_features.label: Filler Word Detection (uh)
causal_features.reason: Oracle treats it as semantic filler-word handling.

causal_features.label: Agreement Expressions (well/yeah)
causal_features.reason: Encodes agreement semantics, not mere token spotting.

causal_features.label: Sports Tournament Context
causal_features.reason: Task-relevant contextual semantics from prompt content.

causal_features.label: Causal Connector (because)
causal_features.reason: Semantic connector relevant to relation inference.
